name: OpenAlex
notes: Fully open scholarly catalog with REST API and snapshots. Good first choice for broad automatic metadata search.
limits: Metadata still needs DOI/full-text verification before extracting experimental values.

name: Crossref
notes: Strong source for DOI-centered metadata. Useful for normalizing article identity.
limits: Usually metadata only; abstracts and full text are not always available.

name: Semantic Scholar
notes: Academic Graph API can enrich paper search with citation and reference context.
limits: Rate limits/API key policy should be checked before large batch jobs.

name: arXiv
notes: Public API and open metadata/PDF access make it useful for ARPES preprint testing.
limits: Preprints may not be peer reviewed; publisher version may differ.

name: Europe PMC
notes: Less central for ARPES, but useful if materials overlap with bio/chem literature.
limits: Coverage is biomedical/life-science oriented, not a primary condensed matter index.

name: Web of Science
notes: Already supported through CSV/TSV export import. API integration needs Clarivate license/API key.
limits: Not fully open; automated API access depends on institutional subscription.

name: Google Scholar
notes: Supported through manual BibTeX import from Scholar citation dialog.
limits: No stable official public search API; do not automate scraping because of CAPTCHA/blocking and usage constraints.

name: Scopus
notes: Potential future source if the lab has Elsevier/Scopus API access or exported CSV.

name: APS Journals
notes: Useful publisher source for ARPES and superconductivity articles in Physical Review journals.
limits: Full-text and figure reuse depend on article access/license; use DOI/page links and supplemental material links.

name: Nature Portfolio
notes: Good for curated high-impact article entries and data availability links.
limits: Automated full-text/figure extraction is limited by access and licensing.

name: ScienceDirect
notes: Use DOI and article pages for publisher-verified metadata and supplement links.
limits: API/full text may require Elsevier entitlement; respect licenses.

name: SpringerLink
notes: Useful for article landing pages and supplement/data links.
limits: Full-text access and figure extraction depend on article license.

name: IOPscience
notes: Good additional publisher source for materials and condensed-matter literature.
limits: Full-text and figure extraction depend on access and licensing.

name: Materials Project
notes: Useful companion to literature search for Sn-Se-S materials properties.
limits: Computed DFT data is not the same as experimental ARPES measurements.

name: OPTIMADE federation
notes: Standard API for querying multiple materials databases in a common format.
limits: Property coverage varies by provider; not a literature search engine.
